title: Golden Globes Final Predictions: 'Sinners,' 'One Battle After Another' & More 2026 Winner Forecasts
text: According to Clayton Davis's predictions for the 83rd Golden Globes, Hamnet directed by Chloé Zhao is forecasted to win Best Motion Picture (Drama). The article notes that while Hamnet appears to be the frontrunner, there exists a theoretical late-surge scenario in which Ryan Coogler's Sinners muscles past it. However, the prediction suggests the Golden Globes may choose to distribute awards more broadly, with Sinners expected to dominate in the cinematic achievement and original score categories instead. The film's lead actress, Jessie Buckley, is also predicted to win in the drama actress category, potentially strengthening Hamnet's overall presence at the ceremony.
